accepted_human_dispositions.notes: Accepted from targeted VLM visual review evidence. This is a VLM-assisted visual disposition for source legibility, question boundary, diagram presence, and cross-page continuity only; it is not authority alignment or production-ready approval. VLM notes: Watermark present at bottom (Chinese text with WeChat ID), but does not impair visual legibility or question content. Single crop stack contains full Question 1 with clear text, blank answer lines, and mark allocation [3]. No diagrams/tables required per question statement.

Operator override: VLM rejected only the known watermarked source posture while accepting the visual checks needed for this queue; under this watermarked-shard contract, watermark alone is not a visual blocker when boundary, legibility, diagram/table presence, and continuity checks are intact. Original VLM notes: Watermark present at bottom (red text: '老师微信: liuxue119118...') violates clean source requirement. Question content is otherwise legible, complete, and self-contained on one page with no diagram/table required per question stem.
